description: Derived expert claims for development and game-grouped held-out positions from five checksum-pinned annotation collections.

selection.validation_policy: Frozen before review-rule, evidence, prompt, or model changes; never included in prompts or tuning.
selection.development_only_reason: The Tata Steel cases were inspected while designing the benchmark and cannot serve as held-out validation.

history_dependent_claims: the culmination of Black's earlier strategy
the later tournament reward for the decision
whether the position was still opening preparation
how many tempi White previously spent with the queen
whether the opponent underestimated the move
whether the move was decisive for the game result

source_collections.name: The World Championship Match Nepomniachtchi - Ding
